mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post (user_id, title, content, images, type, tags, is_anonymous, is_official, season) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{images}, #{type}, #{tags}, #{isAnonymous}, #{isOfficial}, #{season})
mapper.select:
SELECT id, user_id,title, content, images, type, tags, view_count, like_count, favorite_count, comment_count, status, is_top, is_anonymous, is_official, create_time, season FROM post WHERE status = 1
AND user_id = #{query.userId}
AND type = #{query.postType}
AND is_official = 0
AND (create_time < #{query.cursorTime} OR (create_time = #{query.cursorTime} AND id < #{query.cursorId}))
AND is_official = 0
AND id < #{query.cursorId}
AND is_official = 1
AND ( CASE WHEN season = #{query.season} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END > #{query.cursorSeasonPriority} OR (CASE WHEN season = #{query.season} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END = #{query.cursorSeasonPriority} AND create_time < #{query.cursorTime}) OR (CASE WHEN season = #{query.season} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END = #{query.cursorSeasonPriority} AND create_time = #{query.cursorTime} AND id < #{query.cursorId}) )
ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC
ORDER BY (like_count * 5 + comment_count * 10 + favorite_count * 3 + view_count * 0.1 - TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, create_time, NOW()) * 2) DESC, id DESC
ORDER BY RAND() DESC
ORDER BY CASE WHEN season = #{query.season} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC, create_time DESC, id DESC
ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC
LIMIT #{query.pageSize}
mapper.update:
UPDATE post
title = #{post.title},
content = #{post.content},
images = #{post.images},
type = #{post.type},
tags = #{post.tags},
is_anonymous = #{post.isAnonymous},
WHERE id = #{post.id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
